name: hyperflow
description: Rules, multi-session project memory, templates, and reviewed multi-agent workflows for Codex App and CLI. Issue to PR when you need it. Memory and doctrine stay in your project.

interface.shortDescription: Memory, rules, templates, and reviewed multi-agent chains for Codex
interface.longDescription: Hyperflow gives Codex a full engineering system: intent routing, multi-session project memory under .hyperflow/memory/, task templates, portable doctrine/rules, Worker-to-Reviewer specialist checks, parallel workers, optional local visual artefacts, security guardrails, and gated release. Plan and build across two sessions via git handoff packages when needed.
defaultPrompt: Use Hyperflow to plan this feature
Show what Hyperflow remembers about this repo
